name: Chocolate Covered Marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips and shortening in a 2-cup measure.
2. Microwave at medium (50%) for 1-1/2 to 3-1/2 minutes, or until the chips are shiny and soft.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Place nuts in a shallow dish.
5. Insert a pick into the top of each marshmallow.
6. Dip the marshmallow in chocolate to cover completely.
7. Roll the marshmallow in nuts, coating about three-fourths up.
8. Set on wax paper.
9. Repeat with remaining marshmallows.
10. Let stand until firm.
11. Stir together leftover nuts and chocolate.
12. Drop by spoonfuls onto wax paper.
13. Wrap marshmallows and candy drops individually in plastic wrap or store in a covered container.
NOTE: This mixture can also be used for bananas: Slice, dip and freeze. Can also be used for strawberries as for any other dipping candy recipe. The strawberries can be dipped and placed in egg cartons until dry. Any fruit recipes should be placed in the refrigerator until ready to serve. The fruit coated candy will keep 2 or three days.
DEIDRE ANNE PENROD (FGGT98B)
